raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Please specify the scope of improvements: a) Primarily writing polish and flow, b) Include structure, logic, and evidence alignment, c) Full review including conceptual reconstruction, novelty, and citations.","rationale":{"R1.1":"Conceptual reconstruction is centrally expected as improving the draft may require reframing the thesis, gap, or contributions for better clarity and impact.","R1.2":"Logical consistency is a central responsibility since improving the draft involves verifying the argument chain for coherence.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is central to ensure claims in the draft are supported by the reported results.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization is centrally expected to enhance the narrative arc and section ordering in the draft.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing as it directly addresses grammar, flow, and conciseness to improve the draft's readability.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected to highlight any limitations or uncertainties in the improved draft.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggerated statements in the research draft.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to keep improvements within the original draft's intended focus.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is central given the potential misuse of LM aggregation in evaluation pipelines.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral but ensures proper attribution in any changes made."}}

validation.error: clarification_question is generic: 'Please specify the scope of improvements: a) Primarily writing polish and flow, b) Include structure, logic, and evidence alignment, c) Full review including conceptual reconstruction, novelty, and citations.'
